name: CLSID / COM Object Hijacking
categoryDescription: Registry keys that cause code to execute at boot, logon, or via Windows subsystem hooks.
description: COM object class registration. InprocServer32 and LocalServer32 map CLSIDs to DLL/EXE paths. Malware registers CLSIDs in HKCU to override HKLM entries without admin rights.
forensic_value: Look for InprocServer32 values pointing to AppData/Temp paths in HKCU. ScriptletURL entries register scriptlet COM objects enabling arbitrary script execution.
